summary: Complete testing of Dashboard Financiero (Phase 2) - GET /api/dashboard-financiero endpoint and frontend React page. All 14 backend API tests pass (100%). All frontend UI tests pass - KPI cards, filters, charts, Ventas POS resumen, and CxC/CxP tables all render correctly.

backend_api.GET /api/dashboard-financiero?empresa_id: PASS - Returns real Odoo data (ventas pendiente=245, confirmada=1)
backend_api.Response structure validation: PASS - All 17 expected keys present (saldo_caja, saldo_banco, saldo_total, ingresos_confirmados, gastos_periodo, utilidad_estimada, cobranzas_reales, egresos_reales, flujo_neto, ventas, cxc_total, cxp_total, cxc_aging, ingresos_por_marca, top_cxc_vencidas, top_cxp_por_vencer, fecha_desde, fecha_hasta)
backend_api.ventas object: PASS - Contains all 7 keys (pendiente, confirmada, credito, descartada, monto_pendiente, monto_confirmada, monto_credito)
backend_api.ingresos_por_marca: PASS - List with correct item structure (marca, ingreso, unidades, num_ventas)

frontend_ui.Page title: PASS - 'Dashboard Financiero' with vision gerencial date range
frontend_ui.Sidebar navigation: PASS - 'Dashboard Financiero' link visible under 'Principal' section
frontend_ui.Filters panel: PASS - Contains all 6 filters (Fecha Desde, Fecha Hasta, Marca, Linea Negocio, Centro Costo, Proyecto)
frontend_ui.Ingresos por Marca pie chart: PASS - Renders with ELEMENT PREMIUM 100% label
frontend_ui.Aging CxC bar chart: PASS - Renders (shows 'No hay CxC pendientes' when no data)
frontend_ui.Ventas POS Resumen por Estado: PASS - Shows 4 states (Pendientes=245, Confirmadas=1, Credito=0, Descartadas=0)
frontend_ui.Top CxC Vencidas table: PASS - Visible (shows 'Sin CxC vencidas' when no data)
frontend_ui.Top CxP por Vencer table: PASS - Visible (shows 'Sin CxP pendientes' when no data)

design_review.KPI card text contrast: PASS - Good contrast with font-weight: 700, font-size: 21.6px
design_review.Section headers: PASS - Properly styled with muted color for sections
design_review.Chart headers: PASS - Colored headers for Top CxC (red) and Top CxP (amber)
design_review.Overall layout: PASS - Clean grid layout with proper spacing

test_credentials.empresa_id_1: Mi Empresa S.A.C. - Empty data (seed company)
test_credentials.empresa_id_6: Ambission Industries SAC - Real Odoo data (245 pending sales, 1 confirmed)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing empresas and real Odoo data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard Financiero (Phase 2) fully tested and working. Backend endpoint /api/dashboard-financiero returns all expected KPIs including tesoreria (saldo_caja, saldo_banco), devengado (ingresos_confirmados from Ventas POS confirmadas), obligaciones (CxC/CxP), aging buckets, and top lists. Frontend page has 12 KPI cards, 2 charts (pie for ingresos_por_marca, bar for cxc_aging), Ventas POS resumen with 4 states, and 2 tables (top CxC vencidas, top CxP por vencer). All filters (date range, marca, linea_negocio, centro_costo, proyecto) toggle correctly. empresa_id=6 has real data from Odoo sync.
